NUMEROUS REPORTS OF HAIL RANGING FROM THE SIZE OF PEAS TO QUARTERS IN AND AROUND SHERIDAN BEGINNING AT 200 PM AND CONTINUING UNTIL AROUND 215 PM.

FLASH FLOODING OCCURRED IN THE DAHL FIRE SCAR, ESPECIALLY IN DRAINAGES ON THE WESTERN SIDE OF THE BURNED AREA. WATER WAS FLOWING ACROSS BUCKSIN ROAD AND FLOODING WAS ALSO SIGNIFICANT IN THE HARPER COULEE. THE FLASH FLOODING BEGAN NEAR 300 PM MDT AND CONTINUED FOR SEVERAL HOURS.
FLASH FLOODING OCCURRED ON THE CHALKY FIRE BURN SCAR BETWEEN COLSTRIP AND LAME DEER. WATER WAS OVER HIGHWAY 39 FOR A TIME. FLASH FLOODING BEGAN NEAR 520 PM MDT AND CONTINUED INTO THE EARLY EVENING.

NUMEROUS SPOTTER REPORTS AND DES REPORTS OF FLASH FLOODING ALONG HALFBREED CREEK SOUTH OF ROUNDUP NEAR THE WILSON BURN AREA. DES NOTES HIGH WATER/DEBRIS OVER NUMEROUS ROADS IN THE DAHL AND WILSON BURN AREAS.
